subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn and Ḥusayn! Hearken unto My call, and be drawn by My words; then arise to celebrate My remembrance and My praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسین و حسین ان استمعا ندائی ثم استجذبا من کلماتی ثم قوما بذکری و ثنائی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
